page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Oncotator is a tool for annotating human genomic point mutations and indels with data relevant to cancer researchers.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web application to annotate point mutations and indels with functional data relevant to cancer researchers. Annotations include gene names, functional consequence (e.g. Missense), PolyPhen-2 predictions, and cancer-specific annotations from resources such as COSMIC, Tumorscape, and published MutSig results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web application to annotate point mutations and indels with functional data relevant to cancer researchers. Annotations include gene names, functional consequence (e.g. Missense), PolyPhen-2 predictions, and cancer-specific annotations from resources such as COSMIC, Tumorscape, and published MutSig results.
